name: agent-negotiation
description: Multi-agent negotiation framework. Propose deals, evaluate offers, run auctions, and optimize outcomes. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: propose_deal
tools.description: Propose a deal between two agents with terms and pricing.

tools.name: evaluate_offer
tools.description: Evaluate an offer using negotiation theory (BATNA, ZOPA, Nash).

tools.name: counter_offer
tools.description: Submit a counter-offer on an existing negotiation.

tools.name: run_auction
tools.description: Run a simulated auction. Bids as JSON: [{"bidder": "A", "amount": 100}, ...]

tools.name: negotiation_status
tools.description: Get status of a negotiation or list all active negotiations.
